text: ### Context: This music video features a rapper performing the song "Cloud 9" in energetic nighttime settings, frequently seen positioned inside or standing next to a dark SUV. The artist raps while holding foam cups and displaying large stacks of money, surrounded by a lively crowd that dances and records the performance using smartphones. Visuals include a police car with flashing lights blocking a street, shots of red and yellow roses falling to the ground, and a woman with pink hair posing near the vehicle as the group celebrates. <caption> A close-up shot introduces a figure seated inside a vehicle, shrouded in shadows with a cool teal lighting cast over the scene. The individual wears a dark hoodie with the hood pulled up and a black balaclava that obscures the lower half of their face, leaving only the eyes and forehead visible as they look off to the left side of the frame. The scene cuts to a wide, nighttime exterior shot of a city street intersection. A police car is parked horizontally across the road, blocking traffic with its red and blue lights flashing intensely against the dark surroundings. In the background, a large, illuminated white building with a tower stands at the end of the street, while traffic lights overhead display red signals. A person wearing a white shirt and dark shorts walks casually across the intersection past the police vehicle, and a dark sedan is parked in the foreground on the left. The view shifts to a split-screen composition. On the left side, the rapper is shown in a medium close-up, wearing dark sunglasses, a thick diamond chain, and a light-colored t-shirt featuring a large graphic print. His dreadlocks are tied back, and he stands outdoors with greenery visible in the blurred background. On the right side of the screen, the camera focuses on the lower body of a person, presumably the rapper, wearing loose-fitting black cargo pants and chunky cream-colored sneakers with thick white soles, standing on a paved surface. A return to the dark, teal-lit interior of the SUV shows two individuals seated in the back. The figure in the foreground remains masked in the dark hoodie, while a second figure, also partially obscured by shadows and a mask, sits further back in the vehicle. The lighting creates a moody, claustrophobic atmosphere within the confined space. The rapper is then captured leaning out of the open rear passenger door of a black SUV. The red text "HOTBOII" sits above the larger, jagged red title "CLOUD 9" overlaid across the center of the screen. The rapper holds a white foam cup in his left hand and wipes his mouth with his right hand. He is dressed in a white t-shirt, dark sunglasses, and jewelry. As he leans against the vehicle's frame, he looks down and handles the foam cup, with the text overlay remaining persistent. The scene transitions to a chaotic nighttime performance setting. The rapper, now wearing a white beanie and sunglasses, holds a microphone close to his mouth, performing with high energy. The background is filled with a crowd of people. The red "CLOUD 9" text remains superimposed over the footage. The camera then cuts to a wider shot of the crowd, a dense group of young men with their hands raised in the air, gesturing and cheering. Many are wearing casual streetwear, and the lighting is a mix of ambient street glow and camera lights, highlighting the energetic movement of the group. </caption> <seed2_6750> <seed2_680> A hand extends toward the camera lens, palm open, in a dimly lit, dark green environment. The view shifts to a night scene within a crowd where a person holds up a smartphone displaying the text "Drop the Album" on its screen. To the left, a box labeled "Runtz" is partially visible amidst the dark, red-tinted lighting. Five young men sit side-by-side on a low brick wall at night, appearing to be part of the crowd. This is followed by a shot of a figure in a dark hooded sweatshirt, with the hood pulled up to obscure their face in shadow, standing outdoors near a white building and green trees. A close-up reveals diamond jewelry resting on a surface. The scene then shows a person with dreadlocks, wearing a striped shirt, walking away from the camera at night toward a parked white SUV and other vehicles in the distance. The shot widens to capture a large, dense crowd gathered at night, illuminated by bright lights in the background. The camera focuses on the ground where red and yellow roses are scattered on the concrete pavement next to the tire of a vehicle; a hand reaches down toward the flowers. The video concludes with the rapper standing in the center of the crowd at night, wearing a beanie, a light t-shirt, and thick chains. The scene cuts to a black-and-white medium shot outdoors where the rapper stands in front of the open trunk of the SUV. He wears the same outfit and sunglasses, raising both hands to point casually at his temples while facing slightly away from the camera. A blurred figure stands in the background near a building structure. The camera creates a motion-blurred effect as the rapper moves his hands rapidly in front of a background filled with green foliage. The image is distorted, emphasizing the movement of his hands and the surrounding greenery. Two individuals dressed in black hoodies and full-face black masks stand near the open door of the SUV. The camera focuses on the figure in the foreground, whose eyes are visible through the mask, staring directly at the lens. The setting remains outdoors with green vegetation visible in the background. The scene shifts to a crowded environment where the rapper stands centrally, singing with his mouth open. A crowd surrounds him against a brick wall background. In the foreground, a hand holds up a large white object, obscuring part of the view, while the rapper and crowd appear to be in a confined space. Returning to the outdoor setting with the SUV, the rapper stands centrally with the two masked figures positioned behind him on either side. He raises both hands, extending his middle fingers toward the camera, and then transitions into gesturing with his hands while looking forward. The lighting has a distinct green tint. In a low-angle shot at night, the rapper squats on a paved surface, using a lighter to light an object held in his mouth. He wears patterned shorts with visible lettering. The camera then tilts upwards to show a string of lights hanging against the dark night sky near the edge of a roof. The rapper appears again in the center of an energetic crowd at night. Several individuals in the crowd raise their arms and gesture while the rapper looks toward the camera. The lighting is dim, suggesting an outdoor nighttime gathering. The final shot shows the rapper crouching low to the ground in a garden-like area with a tree and a concrete wall behind him. <caption> The video opens at night with a medium shot of the rapper, wearing a white beanie, gold chain, and white t-shirt, standing centrally amidst a dense crowd of young men. The crowd surrounds him, raising their hands and moving energetically while the rapper gestures with both hands, performing towards the camera with a brick building visible in the background. The scene shifts to a low-angle medium shot near an open vehicle door at night. The rapper, now wearing thick-rimmed glasses and a grey patterned jacket with patches, squats or sits while holding a bouquet of red and yellow roses in his hands, looking slightly upward. Cutting to a different outdoor night setting, the rapper stands alone in a medium shot, illuminated by orange streetlights and background foliage. He wears the white beanie and t-shirt ensemble again, crossing his arms over his chest and gesturing while looking down and to the side. Next, the rapper is seen in a medium close-up, crouching low in what appears to be a twilight setting. He wears dark sunglasses and a light green t-shirt with graphic text, staring directly into the camera lens with heavy silver chains hanging from his neck. The camera moves in for a close-up of the rapper in the same outfit and sunglasses. He stands near a dark vehicle, extending his hand towards the camera lens with fingers spread, emphasizing his jewelry and facial expression. The view returns to the rapper sitting on the edge of the open door of the SUV at night. Dressed in the grey patterned jacket and shorts, he holds a burger in his left hand while gesturing with his right, speaking or rapping towards the viewer. A low-angle wide shot captures a balcony scene at night, adorned with string lights. A maroon banner hangs from the railing reading "INTERFRATERNITY COUNCIL INTRAMURALS CHAMPIONS THETA CHI 2023-2024." The rapper, dressed in black, stands center stage on the platform, flanked by the cheering crowd who raise their arms in celebration. The scene transitions to the rapper standing next to the open door of the dark SUV during the day. Wearing sunglasses and the light green graphic t-shirt, he leans out from the vehicle frame, rapping expressively and gesturing with his right hand toward the camera. Finally, the video moves indoors to a crowded room with brick walls. The rapper, wearing dark sunglasses and a black jacket, stands in the center of the enthusiastic crowd. He points directly at the camera with his index finger while the surrounding young men lean in, shout, and gesture towards the lens. </caption> <seed2_7224> <seed2_680> <seed2_1878> <seed2_1657> Returning to the outdoor waterside location, a wide shot shows the **rapper** standing on a paved area next to the open rear of the **SUV**. The video cuts to a chaotic night scene outdoors where the **rapper**, dressed in a light yellow t-shirt and white beanie, performs amidst a tight-knit **crowd**. The surrounding men have their arms raised and appear to be shouting and dancing. A close-up within the same night crowd shows the **rapper** holding a thick stack of **money** to his ear as if it were a telephone. He smiles at the camera while members of the **crowd** lean in and gesture excitedly around him. The visual returns briefly to the low-angle view of the balcony with the championship banner. The **rapper** and the **crowd** remain on the balcony, with the **rapper** now raising both arms high into the air. Finally, the **rapper** appears on a stage or platform, backlit by bright, hazy lights. <caption> At night, in an outdoor setting illuminated by streetlights, a *rapper* stands centrally surrounded by a dense *crowd* of young men. The *rapper* wears a light yellow t-shirt, heavy chain necklaces, and a white beanie with text on the front. Initially, he looks downward and gestures with his hands near his waist while the *crowd* leans in closely around him against a backdrop featuring a brick wall. The scene continues with the *rapper* smiling broadly and looking to his left as a member of the *crowd* in a white t-shirt wraps an arm around his shoulders, while other members of the group smile and look toward him. The video cuts to a close-up shot of the *rapper* outdoors during the day, set against a blurred background of green foliage with a heavy teal color grade. He is now wearing dark sunglasses and holds a white *foam cup* in his right hand, extending it toward the camera lens. In the subsequent shot, the *rapper* is shown in profile facing the right side of the screen. He stands beneath the open orange hatch of a vehicle, potentially an *SUV*, while a green lens flare and atmospheric haze obscure parts of the frame. He keeps his arms close to his body in this medium shot. Returning to the night setting with the brick wall background, the *rapper* stands in the center of the frame, pointing his right index finger directly at the camera lens while looking forward. The *crowd* remains positioned behind him. Immediately following this, the *rapper* and the surrounding *crowd* simultaneously look upward, raising their arms and pointing their fingers toward the sky. </caption> <seed2_6750> <seed2_680>
